◎译　　名　掠食动物生存战
◎片　　名　Secret Life of Predators
◎年　　代　2013

◎简　　介  

　　Predators can be iconic or surprising.  Some are easy to recognize -- and some you’d never even suspect -- but every one of them must strategize … improvise … and specialize in order to survive. Every predator on our planet has tricks that help them beat the odds, and they perfect these skills and weapons to succeed wherever they live -- and to best whatever they’re faced with....
